steps.t: Ashâmi is ready to return to Numûru at his post in Urmâkh. She wants you to ensure that Raphûz is also ready to return to Mizâdi's captain. You will f…
Raphûz and Ashâmi are both ready to return to Numûru. They ask you to meet them at Numûru's post in Urmâkh to see the result of their efforts.
Numûru said there is one more task that Ashâmi and Raphûz must complete together. The two were surprised they had not done enough. He instructed you t…
Ashâmi and Raphûz returned to their home in Urmâkh to discuss how they will undertake the next challenge. They wish to speak to you at their home in U…
